environment_variables.VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY: Required for Firebase Authentication and Database connectivity in production.
environment_variables.VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN: Required for Google Sign-In and session synchronization.
environment_variables.VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET: Required for storing user data or charts.
environment_variables.VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID: Used for push notifications on planet transits / ingress alerts.
environment_variables.VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID: Uniquely identifies this PWA instance in Firebase console.
environment_variables.VITE_JHORA_API_URL: The HTTPS base URL of the self-hosted JHoraAI / VedicAstro backend calculations.
